pi_items.source: Confirmed via web search that this is the standard OpenMRS core UUID for the Parent/Child relationship type. It is also explicitly hardcoded and checked in setup_task.sh and export_result.sh.
Confirmed via web search that this is the standard OpenMRS core UUID for the Sibling/Sibling relationship type. It is also explicitly hardcoded and checked in setup_task.sh and export_result.sh.

privileged_info_summary: The task generates two synthetic patients: 'Bobby Tables' (the child) and 'Martha Tables' (the parent), initially linked with an incorrect Sibling relationship (using standard OpenMRS Sibling UUID 8d91a01c-c2cc-11de-8d13-0010c6dffd0f). The user must delete this incorrect link and create a new Parent/Child relationship (using standard OpenMRS Parent UUID 8d91a210-c2cc-11de-8d13-0010c6dffd0f), correctly setting Martha as the parent of Bobby.
